## Overview

`defenseclaw-gateway watchdog` — Health watchdog that notifies when the gateway is down.

## Reference

<!-- BEGIN AUTOGEN:cli_go:watchdog -->
<!-- Do not edit by hand. Regenerate with `make docs-gen`. -->

### Synopsis

```bash
watchdog
```

### Subcommands

| Subcommand | Description |
|---|---|
| `start` | Start the watchdog as a background daemon |
| `status` | Show the watchdog daemon status |
| `stop` | Stop the running watchdog daemon |

### Description

The watchdog polls the gateway /health endpoint and sends desktop
notifications when the sidecar is unreachable or degraded.

Run in the foreground:  defenseclaw-gateway watchdog
Run as background:      defenseclaw-gateway watchdog start
Stop:                   defenseclaw-gateway watchdog stop

### `defenseclaw-gateway watchdog start`

#### Synopsis

```bash
start
```

#### Description

Start the watchdog as a background daemon


### `defenseclaw-gateway watchdog status`

#### Synopsis

```bash
status
```

#### Description

Show the watchdog daemon status


### `defenseclaw-gateway watchdog stop`

#### Synopsis

```bash
stop
```

#### Description

Stop the running watchdog daemon

<!-- END AUTOGEN:cli_go:watchdog -->
